office_does: The sheriff leads county law enforcement, patrol and investigations, civil process, and related public-safety operations.
race_blurb: Incumbent Derek Sanders emphasizes de-escalation and partnerships; detective Kevin Burton-Crow emphasizes accreditation, published rules, victim-centered training, and budget disclosure.

candidates.summary: Burton-Crow is a special-victims detective and union leader proposing accreditation, policy transparency, victim-centered training, and budget disclosure.
highlights: Has served as a special-victims, patrol, and reserve deputy and as a military leader [S1]
Proposes accreditation, published policies, victim-centered and harm-reduction training, and annual budget disclosure [S1][S2]

safety.basis: His safety platform specifically includes victim-centered and harm-reduction training alongside professional standards.

experience.basis: He has extensive deputy and military experience but is the challenger to agency leadership.

candidates.summary: Sanders is the incumbent sheriff, emphasizing de-escalation, public communication, community relationships, and regional partnerships.
highlights: Has served as sheriff since 2022 after work as a community-service officer and deputy [S1]
Emphasizes de-escalation, communication, community relationships, and regional partnerships [S1][S2]

safety.basis: He explicitly centers de-escalation, community relationships, and partnerships in public safety.

experience.basis: He is the incumbent sheriff with prior front-line agency experience.
